use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with engaging hover animations
Interactive form submit buttons with loading states
Navigation and menu trigger buttons with visual feedback
Action buttons requiring disabled/enabled state management
Buttons needing variant styling for different importance levels
ai_summary: A React button component featuring a distinctive curtain hover effect where the background slides up while text color inverts. Built with Framer Motion for smooth 0.4s ease-out transitions using expo easing. Supports multiple variants (default, outline, ghost, destructive), sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), and built-in loading states with Lucide loader icon. The component uses forwardRef for React integration and handles hover states internally with React.useState. Perfect for creating engaging interactive buttons in SaaS dashboards, e-commerce checkout flows, and fintech applications.
